class.name: GaussianSplatWorld
class.brief_description: Resource that bundles Gaussian splat data with spatial chunking and world-level metadata.
class.description: GaussianSplatWorld is a persistent resource that combines a [GaussianData] payload with static spatial chunks, bounding volume, and arbitrary metadata. It serves as the on-disk representation of a pre-chunked Gaussian splat scene, enabling the streaming system to load individual spatial regions on demand. Use [member gaussian_data] to access the underlying splat data, [member bounds] to query the world-space extents, and [method get_chunk_count] / [method get_chunk_sizes] / [method get_chunk_aabbs] to inspect the spatial partitioning. The [code].gsplatworld[/code] file extension is the native format for this resource.

method.name: get_chunk_count
method.description: Returns the number of static spatial chunks in this world resource.

method.name: get_chunk_sizes
method.description: Returns a packed array where each element is the number of splat indices in the corresponding chunk.

method.name: get_chunk_aabbs
method.description: Returns an array of [AABB] values, one per chunk, representing the bounding volume of each spatial region.

method.name: clear
method.description: Removes all data from this world resource, releasing the [GaussianData] reference, clearing chunks, resetting bounds, and emptying metadata.

members.member: The underlying [GaussianData] resource containing the splat payload for this world.
The world-space axis-aligned bounding box enclosing all splats.
Arbitrary metadata dictionary. May contain keys such as [code]lod_levels[/code], source file information, or application-specific tags.
